title: Dependabot can't parse your go.mod
body:
Dependabot couldn't parse the go.mod found at `/go.mod`.

The error Dependabot encountered was:

```
go: github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.1.0 requires
	github.com/mtrmac/gpgme@v0.0.0-20170102180018-b2432428689c: invalid version: unknown revision b2432428689c
```

[View the update logs](https://app.dependabot.com/accounts/containers/update-logs/20941180).

comments.body:
Oh, wonderful. That looks like my fault — I force-pushed to that repo, and apparently that makes the commit reference break.

I have re-pushed that commit into a master-as-of-image-v5.1.0 branch , that could help.
